anti_claims: This organ JSON seed does not flip source authority away from core/organ_atlas.json and core/organ_registry.json.
Required paper/mechanism/code links prove declared structural references only, not runtime correctness or release readiness.
Selective concept, principle, axiom, and sibling-organ edges are not inferred from prose, specialty, family, or evidence class.
Absent selective organ edges are residual pressure, not evidence that no neighbours exist.
Generated markdown, graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

code_loci.role: Runtime authority for Lean Std premise-index fixture validation, exported index-bundle validation, source-module manifest checks, negative-case enforcement, and body-free receipt writing.

mechanism_refs.edge_justification: The organ's source module, first-wave fixture, premise-index receipts, copied public Lean source manifest, acceptance receipt, authority ceiling, and negative cases validate public-safe premise metadata without running Lean/Lake, exposing proof bodies or oracle-needed ids, calling providers, or authorizing release.

omitted: runtime outputs beyond named public receipts
selective doctrine neighbours not named by atlas source rows
omission_receipt.reason: Organ instance preserves public-safe atlas/registry fields. Required links resolve only when source ids or paths resolve; selective law/concept/principle edges remain residual unless source evidence names ids.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Populate missing paper/mechanism/code links from source evidence, then bind concept/principle/axiom/wires_to edges only when ids are named.

organ_payload.claim_ceiling: It only validates the public-safe projection of premise metadata and copied non-secret macro bodies; it does not run Lean or Lake, prove any theorem correct, expose proof bodies or oracle-needed ids, call providers, produce benchmark scores, or authorize release.

source_atlas_row.agent_gloss: An agent runs it to validate that a premise-index bundle's metadata (and, in exported-bundle mode, copied public-safe macro receipt bodies) stays inside the closed-index public-safe boundary (no Mathlib refs, no proof bodies, no oracle-needed ids, no test-split-tuning authority, every row citing an Init/ Lean source) and to read the resulting pass/blocked receipt. It never runs Lean/Lake or authorizes release.
source_atlas_row.claim_ceiling_restated: It only validates the public-safe projection of premise metadata and copied non-secret macro bodies; it does not run Lean or Lake, prove any theorem correct, expose proof bodies or oracle-needed ids, call providers, produce benchmark scores, or authorize release.

code_loci.role: Runtime authority for Lean Std premise-index fixture validation, exported index-bundle validation, source-module manifest checks, negative-case enforcement, and body-free receipt writing.

source_atlas_row.human_gloss: Presents a small, fixed catalog of Lean standard-library "premises" (named building blocks like facts about numbers, booleans, lists, and basic logic) along with the labels and source references that say where each one comes from. It shows what proof ingredients are on the table and that they were copied from public Lean sources, with no hidden proof text, no Mathlib, and nothing that secretly gives away test answers. It only checks and displays this catalog; it does not run Lean or prove anything.

mechanism_refs.edge_justification: The organ's source module, first-wave fixture, premise-index receipts, copied public Lean source manifest, acceptance receipt, authority ceiling, and negative cases validate public-safe premise metadata without running Lean/Lake, exposing proof bodies or oracle-needed ids, calling providers, or authorizing release.

source_atlas_row.wiring_note: binds only to the shared kernel + evidence/authority spine (private-state scan, receipts, schemas); it cites the private formal_math_premise_retrieval macro run as its projection source, not as a runtime-wired organ. Doctrine-lattice wires_to additions in this row are source-derived from core/mechanism_sources.json upstream_of rows for the organ's hosted mechanism(s); they name structural sibling navigation only, not live invocation, release authority, or proof of runtime integration.

source_registry_row.claim_ceiling: projection mechanics only, not domain correctness
source_registry_row.classification_basis: bounded premise-index projection over closed public Lean/Std fixture rows
